rationale: A high-visibility deployment of armored columns and air assets near the front will reassert dominance and counter enemy morale gains from recent defenses.
Conducting large-scale drills along the northern border demonstrates resolve to both allies and domestic audiences, reinforcing commitment without immediate escalation.
Persistent surveillance of Tethys’ newly fortified positions is essential to identify vulnerabilities for future targeting and to counter their improved cyber and information resilience.
Strengthening our cyber resilience is critical to protect military and economic operations as Tethys gains technical support and improves its own cyber posture.
Proactively disrupt Tethys-aligned intelligence networks to prevent further leaks that could undermine our military and diplomatic positioning.
Counter shifting global narratives by amplifying evidence of Tethys’ aggression and our strategic restraint, aligning with realist credibility while managing coalition concerns.
Issuing war bonds will mobilize domestic capital to offset sanction pressures and fund critical military and economic operations without increasing external debt.
Engaging neutral nations in trade negotiations will help reroute critical exports and import substitutes, mitigating the impact of existing sanctions.
Imposing targeted trade restrictions on Tethys will exert reciprocal pressure, complementing military and cyber initiatives by weakening their supply chain resilience.
To exploit our fragile battlefield gains and shifting international sentiment, a visible demonstration of military resolve will deter further Novaris aggression and reassure wavering allies.
Strengthening internal vigilance along our frontlines consolidates recent defensive successes and prevents exploitation during this critical window of geopolitical reassessment.
Proactive intelligence gathering on enemy movements is essential to anticipate Novaris’s recalibration and identify windows for future asymmetric operations.
Strengthening our cyber resilience is critical to protect command systems and maintain operational integrity as Novaris recalibrates its hybrid warfare tactics.
Proactive counterespionage will disrupt enemy efforts to exploit political divisions and erode confidence in our war effort amid leadership challenges.
Leveraging growing international sympathy, we amplify our narrative through trusted global media channels to solidify diplomatic support and undermine Novaris’s legitimacy.
To actively mobilize domestic economic resilience and fund critical defense and infrastructure needs without increasing external dependency, we must launch a national war bonds campaign.
By securing new trade corridors with non-aligned nations, we can offset sanction pressure and diversify our economy, complementing military and intelligence efforts to stabilize the nation.

Imposing precise economic penalties on key Novaris state enterprises will signal resolve and mirror international pressure, enhancing our diplomatic alignment without escalating broad economic conflict.
A high-level visit to our key ally will reinforce bilateral ties amid domestic pressures there, solidifying military and political support at a critical moment.
Quiet talks with influential non-aligned nations can build behind-the-scenes diplomatic goodwill and open alternative channels for future coalition expansion.
Demonstrating our capacity to protect and provide for our population reinforces our legitimacy domestically and internationally, countering Novaris’s narrative of instability.
